initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT d_date, SUM(sales.ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM (
  SELECT ss_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk, ss_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price
  FROM store_sales
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ws_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk, ws_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price
  FROM web_sales
  UNION ALL
  SELECT cs_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk, cs_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price
  FROM catalog_sales
) AS sales
JOIN date_dim ON sales.sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY d_date
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100
